name: direnv Integration
description: Installs direnv and hooks it into shell startup for automatic .envrc loading when changing directories inside the devcontainer

version.description: direnv version to install, or 'latest' for auto-resolution from GitHub releases

shell.description: Shells to hook into: auto, bash, zsh, fish. Use comma-separated for multiple.

autoAllow.description: Automatically run 'direnv allow' in workspace directories where .envrc exists
